board_csa_architect.notes: No schema impact. Extends existing HardwareTier union cleanly. Docker profile approach prevents accidental brain starts. Aligns with Phase K RunPod integration.

board_ciso_cybersecurity.notes: No new attack surface — reuses existing SSH key infrastructure. No RLS/PII impact. Lockfile permissions should be 0600. Tunnel cleanup in dev-cloud.sh down prevents orphan processes.

board_caio_fullstack.notes: Zero local VRAM impact — brain is remote. Serial paging correctly disabled. 30s timeout appropriate for network-bound requests. Model identifier swap enables correct prompt formatting for Llama-70B.

board_vp_ops_devops.notes: Lockfile pattern prevents duplicate tunnels. PID cleanup handles laptop sleep/wake. Docker profile approach is idempotent. No production deployment impact — dev-time only.

board_red_team.notes: 3 failure scenarios: (1) lockfile leak — mitigated by 0600 perms, (2) stale tunnel — mitigated by status health check, (3) cost explosion — mitigated by down reminder. STRIDE: no Elevation risk (dev-only). Conditions: lockfile 0600, status verifies PID alive, down prints pod stop reminder.
